creator: info@babaei.net
text:
I updated OpenLDAP on two of my production servers (11.1-RELEASE and 10.3-RELEASE). Unfortunately, all LDAP dependant services on both servers stopped working. Even, a simple ldapsearch refuses to work.

I must note that I'm using LibreSSL from ports. I downgraded the ports and everything works fine. It seems other the new version or its patch for LibreSSL messed up something.

I described my issue and the workaround in details here: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/61884/
